title: quercus × benkoei
intro: Quercus × benkoei, a hybrid of the Quercus acutissima and Quercus serrata species, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Quercus × benkoei include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Quercus × benkoei include tea infusions and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
